igovtt__government_payments.name: All government payments
igovtt__government_payments.description: Total government payments include direct payments, countercyclical-type payments, marketing loan benefits, conservation payments, and other payments.

kntdp__government_payments.name: Farms
kntdp__government_payments.description: Estimated number of farms receiving a fixed direct payment.

igovccpt__government_payments.name: Countercyclical-type payments
igovccpt__government_payments.description: Countercyclical-type payments are made to producers of eligible crops, based on historical production of program crops, but the payment rates depend on market prices.  The countercyclical payment (CCP) program that began with the 2002 Farm Act ended in 2014, as did the countercyclical Average Crop Revenue Election (ACRE) program. Two new countercyclical-type programs have since been established: the Price Loss Coverage (PLC) program and the Agriculture Risk Coverage (ARC) program.

kntccp__government_payments.name: Farms
kntccp__government_payments.description: Number of farms receiving a countercyclical-type payment that are a function of commodity prices.

kountg__government_payments.name: Farms
kountg__government_payments.description: Number of farms receiving government payments.

kountn__government_payments.name: Farms
kountn__government_payments.description: Number of farms not receiving government payments.

igovdpt__government_payments.name: Direct payments
igovdpt__government_payments.description: Direct payments are payments made to producers based on eligible historical acreage of program crops and historical yields. Between 1996 and 2001, fixed payments were provided as production flexibility contract (PFC) payments before being redesigned in the 2002 Farm Act as direct payments. These direct payments ended as a result of the Agricultural Act of 2014.

kntmlb__government_payments.name: Farms
kntmlb__government_payments.description: Estimated number of farms receiving a marketing loan benefit.

kntcnsv__government_payments.name: Farms
kntcnsv__government_payments.description: Number of farms receiving a conservation program payment.

conspayt__government_payments.name: Conservation payments
conspayt__government_payments.description: Conservation program payments are payments made to producers that include land-retirement programs where agricultural production cannot occur on land enrolled in the program as well as working-land programs that provide payments for maintaining or adopting resource conservation practices on land in production.

igovt__government_payments.name: Average payments per farm
igovt__government_payments.description: Government payments received across all programs, all farms.

kntoth__government_payments.name: Farms
kntoth__government_payments.description: Estimated number of farms receiving other types of payments including disaster and emergency payments.

igovtg2__government_payments.name: Average payments per farm
igovtg2__government_payments.description: Government payments received across all programs, all program participants.

mlbt__government_payments.name: Marketing loan benefits payments
mlbt__government_payments.description: Marketing loan benefits, including Loan Deficiency Program payments, Marketing Loan Gains, and Certificate Exchange Gains, are payments made to farmers based on market prices for eligible commodities falling below program target prices. Marketing assistance loan programs are based on current production and tend to provide payments when market prices fall below target levels.

igovdp1__government_payments.name: Average government payment per participating farm
igovdp1__government_payments.description: Direct payments received by direct payment program participants.

igovtn1__government_payments.name: Average payments per farm
igovtn1__government_payments.description: Government payments received across all programs, all non-participants.

otherpayt__government_payments.name: Other government program payments
otherpayt__government_payments.description: Other government program payments include payments from disaster relief programs and emergency payments. They tend to be temporary, as-needed Government responses to droughts, floods, and other natural disasters. We include various other programs as well, including the milk income support programs, the tobacco transition program, peanut quota buyouts, and/or all other programs not specified in ARMS questionnaires.

igcfi__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per farm
igcfi__government_payments.description: For farms participating in government programs, gross cash farm income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operation from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

igovccp1__government_payments.name: Average government payment per participating farm
igovccp1__government_payments.description: Countercyclical-type payments received by countercyclical-type program participants.

igcfig__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per farm
igcfig__government_payments.description: For farms participating in government programs, gross cash income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operation from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

mlb2__government_payments.name: Average government payment per participating farm
mlb2__government_payments.description: Marketing loan benefit payments received by marketing loan program participants.

conspay2__government_payments.name: Average government payment per participating farm
conspay2__government_payments.description: Conservation payments received by conservation program participants.

igcfin__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per farm
igcfin__government_payments.description: For farms not participating in government programs, gross cash farm income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operation from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

incfi__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per farm
incfi__government_payments.description: For all farms, net cash farm income less cash expenses.

otherpay1__government_payments.name: Average government payment per participating farm
otherpay1__government_payments.description: Other government program payments received by other payment program participants.

igcfidp__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per participating farm
igcfidp__government_payments.description: Gross cash income for farms participating in direct payment programs. Gross cash income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operations from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

incfig__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per farm
incfig__government_payments.description: For all farms participating in any government programs, net cash farm income is gross cash income less cash expenses.

incfin__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per farm
incfin__government_payments.description: For farms not participating in any government programs, net cash farm income is gross cash income less cash expenses.

igcficcp__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per participating farm
igcficcp__government_payments.description: Gross cash income for farms participating in countercyclical-type programs. Gross cash income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operations from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

igcfimlb__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per participating farm
igcfimlb__government_payments.description: Gross cash income for farms participating in marketing loan benefit programs. Gross cash income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operations from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

igcficnsv__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per participating farm
igcficnsv__government_payments.description: Gross cash income for farms participating in conservation programs. Gross cash income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operations from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

igcfioth__government_payments.name: Average gross cash farm income per participating farm
igcfioth__government_payments.description: Gross cash income for farms participating in other types of programs. Gross cash income is the total amount of cash received by the farm operations from the sale of agricultural products, services rendered, or government payments received during a given calendar year.

incfidp__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per participating farm
incfidp__government_payments.description: Net cash farm income for farms participating direct payment programs. Net cash farm income is gross cash farm income less cash expenses.

incficcp__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per participating farm
incficcp__government_payments.description: Net cash income for farms participating countercyclical-type programs. Net cash farm income is gross cash farm income less cash expenses.

incfimlb__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per participating farm
incfimlb__government_payments.description: Net cash farm income for farms participating marketing loan benefit programs. Net cash farm income is gross cash farm income less cash expenses.

incficnsv__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per participating farm
incficnsv__government_payments.description: Net cash income for farms participating conservation programs. Net cash farm income is gross cash farm income less cash expenses.

incfioth__government_payments.name: Average net cash farm income per participating farm
incfioth__government_payments.description: Net cash farm income for farms participating conservation programs. Net cash farm income is gross cash farm income less cash expenses.
